title: Foundation tasks projection (tasks.yaml)
description: The WORK spine tier (memo §11): a tool-neutral tasks.yaml projecting the work implied by a SPEC into whatever tracker the team uses. Lives OUTSIDE records/** and is NOT a record.schema.json record.

spec.description: The SPEC id this work realises (the up-chain reference).

tasks.description: The work items projected from the SPEC.

id.description: Stable local key, unique within this file (e.g. T-001).

title.description: Short human summary of the work.

depends_on.description: Task ids in this file that must precede this one.

tracker_ref.description: The projected id in the external tracker (Linear/Jira/GitHub issue key) — the tool-neutral projection seam.
